title: Unified Left Panel Resize/Collapse Behavior and Explore Countywide Layer Drawer Fix

shared_panel_shell_behavior.summary: Search Parcel, Explore Countywide, Model Lab, and Snapshot Builder now use the same left panel shell for collapsed rail, expanded panel, resizing, drag-to-collapse, and internal scrolling.
click_behavior: Collapsed rail icon expands the current mode panel.
Collapsed vertical label expands the current mode panel.
Existing collapse arrow remains available in expanded mode.

drag_to_collapse_threshold.behavior: Dragging the expanded left panel below the threshold snaps to the collapsed rail state and hides expanded content.

resize_width_constraints.last_width_behavior: Expanding from the collapsed rail restores the last safe expanded width or the current preset width.

collapsed_rail_restoration.summary: Collapsed state remains a long slim rail aligned to the map workspace rather than a small floating pill.
visual_notes: Rail remains full-height within the map workspace.
No incorrect small PARCEL pill style is used.

explore_countywide_cut_off_fix.summary: The Countywide layer drawer now constrains width and overflow inside the shared panel shell.
changes: Expanded sidebar uses full-height, min-width: 0, overflow-hidden shell.
Panel body uses overflow-y:auto and overflow-x:hidden.
Layer group containers and rows use min-width:0 and overflow-hidden.
Layer action buttons are grouped so More Info, Configure, Legend, and toggles wrap safely instead of clipping.
Layer drawer scroller retains vertical access to long controls.

model_lab_panel_consistency.summary: Model Lab Controls now inherit the same collapsed rail, resize handle, drag-to-collapse threshold, and vertical scroll behavior from the shared Sidebar shell.
model_lab_panel_consistency.smoke_result: Model Lab expanded at standard width, scrolled internally, and collapsed via drag-left.

snapshot_helper_consistency.summary: Snapshot Builder helper now inherits the same collapsed rail, resize handle, drag-to-collapse threshold, and vertical scroll behavior from the shared Sidebar shell.
snapshot_helper_consistency.smoke_result: Snapshot Builder expanded at standard width, scrolled internally, and collapsed via drag-left.

localStorage_layout_state_handling.summary: No storage key change was needed. Collapsed state overrides width at render time, and dragging from collapsed restores a safe expanded width.

validation_results.python_compileall_app: exit code 0; repo has no top-level app directory, command reported 'Can't list app'
validation_results.python_pytest: passed on rerun with longer timeout: 294 passed, 3 warnings

smoke_test_results.dragging_panel_left_past_threshold_colla: passed in Parcel, Countywide, Model Lab, and Snapshot Builder modes
smoke_test_results.layer_drawer_content_not_cut_off: passed; flood and FEMA rows kept More Info, Configure, Legend, and toggle buttons inside panel bounds
smoke_test_results.right_intelligence_panel_still_works: passed; right panel scrolls internally when content is long
smoke_test_results.search_parcel_still_works: passed; CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 selected and right panel showed Selected Parcel Intelligence
smoke_test_results.model_lab_overlay_still_works: not retoggled in this scoped smoke; Model Lab mode and controls loaded successfully
smoke_test_results.planning_snapshot_still_works: passed; Planning Snapshot loaded and Print Executive Summary was present
smoke_test_results.methodology_still_works: passed; Methodology loaded and Data Needed content was present
smoke_test_results.console_errors: no new browser errors observed; existing ArcGIS label-placement warnings and placeholder layer warnings remained
smoke_test_results.forbidden_model_outputs: targeted scan of modified UI files found no prediction_probability, exact_probability, experimental_probability, raw_model_score, parcel_score, growth_probability, will_develop, or development_signal_class

remaining_known_issues: ArcGIS label-placement warnings still appear for draped graphics.
Existing placeholder layer warnings still appear for layer definitions that intentionally lack approved service URLs.
The collapse arrow intentionally protrudes outside the rail edge as an affordance; regular layer content and action controls remain inside panel bounds.
